common_dropFilesHere: Drop files here or click to browse
tooltip_systemNameUniqueId: System name serves as unique record id
hint_systemNameRecommendation: It is highly recommended to fill in system name only once and not change it later.
deleteConfirm_aboutToDelete: You are about to delete the {entity}
deleteConfirm_agentBody: Deleting the Agent will also permanently delete its Topics with their interactions.
deleteConfirm_aiAppBody: This action will permanently delete the AI App and its AI Tabs.
deleteConfirm_permanentDeleteDisable: This action will permanently delete the {entity} and disable it in all tools that are using it.
deleteConfirm_knowledgeSourceBody: This action will permanently delete the Knowledge Source and disable it in all tools that are using it, e.g. RAG Tools.
deleteConfirm_evaluationSetBody: This action will permanently delete the Evaluation Set.
deleteConfirm_modelBody: If any of your Prompt Templates are using this model, please change it to another one, otherwise affected Prompt Templates will stop working.
deleteConfirm_noteTakerBody: This action will permanently delete the Note Taker configuration.
syncConfirm_syncJobCreated: A sync job {jobId} has been created and started. This process will update your Knowledge Source.
auth_canLoginNow: You can now log in with your email and password.
auth_resetPasswordDescription: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
auth_resetLinkSent: If the email exists, a reset link has been sent.
auth_alreadyHaveAccount: Already have an account? Log in
auth_enterMfaCode: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app
validation_minLength: Field must consist of more than {min} characters
validation_invalidSystemName: System name can only contain letters, numbers, underscores and hyphens, and must not start with a number
validation_invisibleChars: Field contains invisible or whitespace characters that are not allowed
validation_noLeadingTrailingSpaces: Field must not have leading or trailing spaces
validation_systemNameSpaces: System name must not have leading or trailing spaces
validation_systemNameInvisibleChars: System name contains invisible characters that are not allowed
subtitle_addSecurityLayer: Add an extra layer of security to your account
subtitle_addCustomHeaders: Add custom HTTP headers to include with every request
subtitle_allowFeedback: Allow users to send their feedback in form of like or dislike.
subtitle_apiSpecification: API specification for the API Tool
subtitle_hallucinationCheck: Ask LLM to review its own response. A hallucination is a response that is not grounded in provided context
subtitle_authScheme: Authentication and authorization scheme to access the endpoint
subtitle_autoSubscriptions: Automatically create recordings-ready subscriptions for meetings
subtitle_azureBotCredentials: Azure Bot credentials to connect with Note Taker
subtitle_detectLanguageRag: Can be used independently for monitoring purposes and is required for multi-lingual RAG. Makes one extra call to LLM.
subtitle_detectLanguageRetrieval: Can be used independently for monitoring purposes and is required for multi-lingual search. Makes one extra call to LLM.
subtitle_changeAppearance: Change appearance of AI App panel
subtitle_chooseModel: Choose what model you will use for output generation.
subtitle_configureGreeting: Configure default agent message, e.g. greeting
subtitle_configureRagHeading: Configure heading and subheading for your RAG tool
subtitle_configureRetrievalHeading: Configure heading and subheading for your Retrieval tool
subtitle_configureRetrieval: Configure how chunks of content are retrieved and ranked
subtitle_configureChunking: Configure how documents are split into smaller, manageable pieces for processing
subtitle_configureSearch: Configure how search will be performed. To activate hybrid search, enable both semantic and keyword search.
subtitle_configureIndexing: Configure indexing methods to optimize document retrieval and search accuracy
subtitle_configureActionDisplay: Configure information about the Action that is displayed to end user
subtitle_connectionParams: Connection parameters like endpoints and headers
subtitle_controlChunks: Control how many chunks are passed to the language model
subtitle_controlCloseButton: Control if Close button is displayed inside the app
subtitle_controlLogging: Control what data is logged for this prompt template. This affects traces and metrics collection.
subtitle_controlMemory: Controls how much conversation history is passed to the LLM as context.
subtitle_llmDescriptions: Descriptions by which the LLM will choose this Assistant Tool
subtitle_activeDevices: Devices currently logged into your account
subtitle_sampleQuestions: Display up to 3 question suggestions to help users formulate their questions.
subtitle_embedNoteTaker: Embed Note Taker output to a Knowledge Graph for further semantic search
subtitle_enableSummarization: Enable output summarization at different level of detail
subtitle_enableTranscriptEnhancement: Enable speaker mapping and transcript improvement
subtitle_collectRagData: Enable to collect data about RAG tool calls for monitoring and analysis purposes. Adds extra calls to LLM.
subtitle_endpointUrlTransport: Endpoint URL and transport protocol used to communicate with the server
subtitle_linkedIdentityProviders: External identity providers connected to your account
subtitle_speakerDetection: For some models, you can use max number of speakers or diarization threshold parameters to help model detect speakers more accurately.
subtitle_editJobSettings: Go to the Job details to edit settings or cancel scheduled sync.
subtitle_similarityScore: How strictly a user query should match retrieved documents.
subtitle_llmInstructions: Instructions for the Language model that help Agents execute Action
subtitle_closureInterval: Interval after which inactive conversations will be marked as closed
subtitle_scheduledJob: Job that controls the scheduled sync for this Knowledge Source
subtitle_outputLimit: Limits generated output length. Leave blank if not necessary
subtitle_whatsApp: Make the Agent available as a WhatsApp integration
subtitle_web: Make the Agent available as an iframe
subtitle_mockResponse: Mock response for the API Tool
subtitle_acceptCommands: Off by default. If switched on, Note Taker will accept commands from users other than meeting organizer
subtitle_optimizeRag: Optimizes RAG for translation when users ask in other languages than knowledge source language. Makes 3 extra calls to LLM.
subtitle_optimizeRetrieval: Optimizes Retrieval Tool for questions in other languages than knowledge source language. Makes one extra call to LLM.
subtitle_topicInstructions: Optional additional instructions on how to call actions inside the Topic. These instructions will be merged into Agent
subtitle_outputFormat: Parameters that control the output format
subtitle_promptTemplate: Prompt template defines the tone, format, length, etc of responses generated by LLM
subtitle_postProcessing: Prompt Template that controls the post-processing of Agent, including summary, language detection and case resolution check
subtitle_teamsCredentials: Provide identifiers and secrets to be used by the Microsoft Teams Agent
subtitle_slackCredentials: Provide identifiers and secrets to be used by the Slack Agent
subtitle_agentInstructions: Provides general instructions and is applicable to all Topics across Agent.
subtitle_publishConfluence: Publish Note Taker output to a Confluence space
subtitle_reranking: Re-ranking significantly improves search results by selecting most relevant chunks in two steps. Makes an extra call to LLM.
subtitle_requireConfirmation: Require human confirmation before calling API
subtitle_securityValues: Security values depending on security schema type
subtitle_selectKnowledgeSourcesRag: Select one or multiple Knowledge sources to ground your RAG.
subtitle_selectKnowledgeSourcesRetrieval: Select one or multiple Knowledge sources to search
subtitle_selectPostProcessing: Select post-processing Prompt Template. Add question topics that the LLM will use to classify user questions
subtitle_selectTranscriptionModel: Select transcription model to transcribe speech to text
subtitle_semanticCache: Semantic caching helps improve performance and maintain high response quality
subtitle_sendToSalesforce: Send Note Taker transcripts to a Salesforce org
subtitle_showLogo: Show logo in AI App panel
subtitle_storeSampleInput: Store your sample input here and copy to preview area
subtitle_temperature: Temperature controls randomness of output. Top p controls diversity and unpredictability of output. Use default value if you are not certain about these parameters.
subtitle_toolOfOrigin: Tool from which the Action was created
subtitle_topicProcessing: Topic processing prompt provides general instructions applicable to all Topics, like tone, or general contextual information like current date.
subtitle_topicSelection: Topic selection prompt instructs the Agent how to detect correct Topics from user input and handle cases when a Topic was not found.
subtitle_turnOnPostProcessing: Turn on post-processing for advanced Agent analysis and monitoring
subtitle_turnOnMessagePostProcessing: Turn on post-processing on message level
subtitle_turnOnMonitoring: Turn on this option for monitoring purposes. Makes one extra call to LLM
subtitle_testSetType: Type of objects that the Test Set will be used for
subtitle_aiAppUrl: URL to embed the AI App
subtitle_useHeaders: Use headers to send additional information with your request, such as authentication tokens.
subtitle_useSecretsKsp: Use to store sensitive values such as API keys or passwords.
subtitle_useSecretsMcp: Use to store sensitive values such as API keys or tokens.
subtitle_superUser: When set, this user can access ALL transcriptions created by this note-taker bot, regardless of who initiated them.
subtitle_yourRoles: Your assigned roles determine what you can access
hint_agentNameDescription: Please give your Agent a name and description. You will be navigated to Agent configuration screen at the next step.
hint_editAfterSaving: You will be able to edit these and other settings after saving.

hint_configureSettingsAfterSaving: You will be able to configure prompts, iterations, and other settings after saving.

hint_addHeadersMcp: You will be able to add headers and secrets later in MCP Server settings.

hint_systemNameAutoGenerated: System name serves as a unique record ID (auto-generated from name)

hint_topicNameDescription: Give your Topic a name and internal description. You will be able to add LLM instructions later.
hint_topicLlmInstructions: Instructions for the LLM explaining when this topic should be used

hint_candidateRecords: The list is empty by default. Add candidate records from Seed or JSON, select needed rows, then click Load Selected.
hint_customHeaders: Define custom headers that will be sent with each API request. Use placeholders in curly braces to reference secrets.
hint_noSensitiveData: Do not expose sensitive data in this section. Instead, use placeholders and provide actual values in the Secrets section. Use curly braces to insert placeholders.

agents_topicsDescription: Areas of Agent capabilities that include one or multiple Actions
agents_actionsDescription: Tools that the Agent can leverage to process user requests
agents_agentPromptTemplatesDesc: Prompt Templates instruct the Agent how to select and process Topics.

agents_furtherStepsMsTeams: for further steps on MS Teams Agent installation
agents_furtherStepsWhatsApp: for further steps on WhatsApp Agent installation
agents_nameLlmHelp: Helps LLM find and execute Action. Must be unique within the Topic. Cannot contain spaces.
agents_displayNameHelp: This name will be displayed for the end user when the action is selected by an Agent. Keep it short and non-technical.
agents_displayDescriptionHelp: This description will be displayed for the end user when the action is selected by an Agent. Keep it short and non-technical.
agents_requireConfirmationDesc: Require user confirmation before executing this Action
agents_instructionsOverrideGlobal: Instructions from this field will override global instructions for this Action.
agents_useResponseAsAssistantMessageDesc: Uses the action response as assistant message without additional topic processing step. Only applicable if the action is not called in parallel with other actions.
agents_globalInstructionsDefault: A short natural-language action summary to show the user. It should clearly state what the action will do, including relevant argument values. Focus on action, not the result.
agents_topicAdvancedInstructionsSubtitle: Optional additional instructions on how to call actions inside the Topic. These instructions will be merged into Agent's Topic processing prompt inside the '{TOPIC_INSTRUCTIONS}' placeholder.
ragTools_allowMetadataFilteringDesc: Allow to use filtering by metadata to exclude documents, that are not relevant to the search.
ragTools_useSemanticSearchDesc: Use vector embeddings to search documents semantically, based on their meaning rather than just exact matches. Currently, cannot be turned off.
ragTools_useKeywordSearchDesc: Use direct keyword matching. Note that keyword search capabilities depend on the underlying database implementation.
ragTools_useLlmToRank: Use LLM to rank candidate results. Makes extra calls to LLM
ragTools_maxChunksForReranking: Max number of chunks to retrieve for re-ranking
ragTools_rerankingChunksDesc: If re-ranking is turned on, these chunks will be re-ordered to select the most relevant results.
ragTools_similarityScoreDesc: Minimum similarity score needed for a chunk to be retrieved. We recommend using lower threshold if re-ranking is on.
ragTools_maxChunksToLlm: Max number of best retrieved chunks to send to LLM
ragTools_addedChunksDesc: Number of chunks to add before and after each chunk when sending to LLM for better context understanding
ragTools_answerCopied: Answer has been copied to clipboard
retrieval_detectLanguageDisableNote: Language detection must be on to enable multi-lingual Retrieval
retrieval_detectLanguageDisableWarning: When "Detect question language" is disabled, "Enable multi-lingual Retrieval" will also be disabled
retrieval_onlyLogResultsDesc: Perform check and log yes or no. Makes one extra call to LLM.
retrieval_logAndRegenerateDesc: Perform check and ask the LLM to re-generate the response. Makes X extra calls to LLM.

apiServers_fileFormat: File format: JSON or YAML. Please make sure your API spec contains operation Ids and descriptions.

apiServers_invalidJson: Invalid JSON format. Please check your input and ensure it follows valid JSON syntax.

apiServers_secretsSubtitle: Use to store sensitive values such as API keys or passwords.
assistantTools_newToolsAdded: New assistant tool(s) have been added
collectionItems_nothingInSourceYet: Nothing in this knowledge source yet!
collections_deleteChunksMessage: Are you sure you want to delete all embedded chunks?
collections_performSemanticSearch: Perform semantic search for your search term. Returns best 15 results
collections_chunkingSubtitle: Configure how documents are split into smaller, manageable pieces for processing
collections_chunkingStrategyDesc: Chunking strategy defines how documents are divided into smaller chunks for better search results.
collections_chunkSizeDesc: Defines the maximum number of characters in each chunk when splitting.
collections_chunkOverlapDesc: Defines the overlap (in characters) between chunks when splitting.
collections_chunkTransformationDesc: Transforms document chunks before embedding to improve search quality. Note that this transformation can greatly increase latency and cost.
collections_howToApplyTransformationDesc: Defines how transformation is applied to the chunk. For example, you can prepend/append generated text to the chunk, or replace chunk content entirely.
collections_howToUseChunksDesc: Defines which chunk is used for indexing and which for retrieval.
collections_indexingSubtitle: Configure indexing methods to optimize document retrieval and search accuracy
collections_indexingDesc: Enabling both semantic search and keyword search activates hybrid search, which combines the benefits of both approaches, but will increase latency and cost of the search and the source sync.
collections_supportSemanticSearchDesc: Create vector embeddings to support semantic search, which allows you to search for documents based on their meaning rather than just exact matches. Currently, cannot be turned off.
collections_supportKeywordSearchDesc: Toggling this option enables direct keyword matching, which can be beneficial for some use cases. Note that keyword search capabilities depend on the underlying database implementation.
collections_metadataExposureDesc: Configure how chunk metadata will be exposed for search and retrieval. To map metadata fields use JSONPath expression.
collections_clearDescription: Clear description, that can be easily understood by both humans and AI agents.
collections_nameReference: Any clear and concise name, that will be used as a reference across the system.
collections_createJobDescription: Create a job to schedule automatic syncing for this Knowledge Source
collections_scheduleSettingsSubtitle: Go to the Job details to edit settings or cancel scheduled sync.
collections_fileFormats: PDF, DOCX, XLSX, PPTX, HTML, images and more
collections_filesWillBeUploaded: Files will be uploaded after saving the knowledge source
prompts_recommendAltering: We generally recommend altering this or top p, but not both.
prompts_topPTooltip: Top p controls diversity and unpredictability of output.
prompts_controlLogging: Control what data is logged for this prompt template. This affects traces and metrics collection.
prompts_loggingFullDesc: Logs everything including input messages and output responses. Best for debugging and analysis.
prompts_loggingMetadataDesc: Logs only metadata like token count, cost, and latency. Input/output content is not stored.
prompts_loggingNoneDesc: Disables all logging for this prompt template. No traces or metrics will be recorded.
prompts_paramNotAvailable: Parameter is not available for selected model {model}
prompts_ensuresValidJson: Ensures that valid JSON is produced.
prompts_mustInstructJson: You must instruct the model to respond with JSON in Prompt Template body.
prompts_jsonNoGuarantee: JSON mode alone does not guarantee the output matches a specific schema.
prompts_edgeCasesResult: that can result in the model output not being a complete JSON object.
prompts_ensureResponseSchema: Ensure that response adheres to provided schema.
prompts_outputMatchSchema: If filled in, output will match provided schema
prompts_dropFiles: Drop files or click to browse (PDF, Word, Excel, PowerPoint, images, etc.)
prompts_dropAudioFile: Drop audio file or click to browse
prompts_outputCopied: Output has been copied to clipboard

collections_metadataNameHint: Any clear and concise name, that will be used as a reference across the system.
collections_metadataDescriptionHint: Clear description, that can be easily understood by both humans and AI agents.
collections_supportedFileLinks: Links to supported files: PDF, DOCX, XLSX, PPTX, HTML, images, and more
collections_languagesHint: Comma-separated list of language codes (e.g., en,ru)
collections_sectionsHint: Comma-separated list of documentation sections (e.g., quickstarts,admin)
collections_maxCrawlDepthHint: Maximum depth for crawling documentation pages (default: 5)
collections_useOriginalChunkBoth: Use original chunk for both indexing and retrieval
collections_useTransformedChunkBoth: Use transformed chunk for both indexing and retrieval
collections_useOriginalIndexingTransform: Use original chunk for indexing and transformed chunk for retrieval
collections_useTransformedIndexingOrigin: Use transformed chunk for indexing and original chunk for retrieval
collections_scheduledJobSubtitle: Job that controls the scheduled sync for this Knowledge Source
collections_failedToSaveSchedule: Failed to save. Please try again.
collections_chunkingStrategyHint: Chunking strategy defines how documents are divided into smaller chunks for better search results.
collections_chunkSizeHint: Defines the maximum number of characters in each chunk when splitting.
collections_chunkOverlapHint: Defines the overlap (in characters) between chunks when splitting.
collections_chunkTransformationPromptHin: Transforms document chunks before embedding to improve search quality. Note that this transformation can greatly increase latency and cost.
collections_howToApplyTransformationHint: Defines how transformation is applied to the chunk. For example, you can prepend/append generated text to the chunk, or replace chunk content entirely.
collections_howToUseChunksHint: Defines which chunk is used for indexing and which for retrieval.
collections_hybridSearchHint: Enabling both semantic search and keyword search activates hybrid search, which combines the benefits of both approaches, but will increase latency and cost of the search and the source sync.
collections_semanticSearchHint: Create vector embeddings to support semantic search, which allows you to search for documents based on their meaning rather than just exact matches. Currently, cannot be turned off.
collections_keywordSearchHint: Toggling this option enables direct keyword matching, which can be beneficial for some use cases. Note that keyword search capabilities depend on the underlying database implementation.
collections_cronFormatHint: Format: minute hour day month day_of_week (e.g., */10 * * * * for every 10 min)
collections_errorNotificationHint: Email admin in case of syncing errors. Applies only for scheduled sync.

knowledgeGraph_entityExtractionDescripti: Define entity schemas, configure the extraction prompt, and run AI-powered extraction against this knowledge graph
knowledgeGraph_createFirstEntityHint: Create at least one entity definition so the prompt knows what to extract.
knowledgeGraph_configurePromptFirst: Configure a prompt template in extraction settings first
knowledgeGraph_deleteEntityConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete '{name}'?
knowledgeGraph_deleteEntityWarning: This removes the entity definition from the extraction schema. Existing extracted rows are not deleted automatically.
knowledgeGraph_runExtractionConfirm: Are you sure you want to run entity extraction? This will process all documents in the knowledge graph.
knowledgeGraph_runExtractionWarning: Running extraction may take a while depending on the number of documents.
knowledgeGraph_cancelExtractionConfirm: Are you sure you want to cancel the running extraction?
knowledgeGraph_cancelExtractionWarning: Entities already extracted will be kept, but the remaining documents will not be processed.
knowledgeGraph_contentProfilesDescriptio: Configure how different content types are processed and chunked
knowledgeGraph_startByCreatingProfile: Start by creating a new content profile
knowledgeGraph_deleteContentConfigConfir: Are you sure you want to delete '{name}'?
knowledgeGraph_documentBasedDesc: Extract entities from full documents with automatic segmentation for large inputs. Recommended for most graphs.
knowledgeGraph_chunkBasedDesc: Extract entities from each existing chunk. Useful when chunk-level provenance matters most.
knowledgeGraph_splitLargeDocuments: Split large documents into overlapping segments before extraction.
knowledgeGraph_chunkBasedIgnoresSegmenta: Chunk-based extraction uses the existing chunks, so segmentation settings are ignored.
knowledgeGraph_sourceNameDescription: Give this source a friendly name.
knowledgeGraph_syncScheduleDescription: Pick how often to sync and at what time.
knowledgeGraph_syncHourlyDesc: Runs at the start of every hour.
knowledgeGraph_entityExtractionSettingsS: Configure how AI extracts structured entities from your documents
knowledgeGraph_extractionSettingsSection: Choose when entity extraction runs and which prompt template should produce the structured entity output.
knowledgeGraph_extractionModeHint: Choose whether entities are extracted from full documents or from already-generated chunks.
knowledgeGraph_extractionPromptHint: Select a prompt template that returns structured entity records.
knowledgeGraph_segmentationDocDesc: Split large documents into overlapping segments before extraction.
knowledgeGraph_segmentationChunkDesc: Chunk-based extraction uses the existing chunks, so segmentation settings are ignored.
knowledgeGraph_chunkBasedSegmentationNot: Chunk-based extraction reuses the graph's chunks directly, so document segmentation is not applied here.
knowledgeGraph_approachDocumentDesc: Extract entities from full documents with automatic segmentation for large inputs. Recommended for most graphs.
knowledgeGraph_approachChunkDesc: Extract entities from each existing chunk. Useful when chunk-level provenance matters most.
dataExplorer_description: Browse documents, chunks and extracted entities in this knowledge graph
dataExplorer_noDocumentsDesc: Upload documents to this knowledge graph to get started.
dataExplorer_noEntitiesDesc: Run entity extraction to populate entities here.
dataExplorer_noEntityRecords: No extracted records for this entity type yet

dataExplorer_deleteEntityRecordConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete entity '{name}'?
dataExplorer_deleteAllRecordsConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete all {count} records of '{name}'?
dataExplorer_failedToLoadDocuments: Failed to load documents. Please try again.
dataExplorer_noChunksDesc: This document has no content chunks
dataExplorer_noInformationDesc: This document has no AI summary or metadata
retrieval_noExamplesYet: No examples yet. Add one to guide the agent's behavior.
retrieval_agentConfigurationDesc: Configure the ReAct instructions, tools, generation parameters, and guided examples to tune retrieval agent behavior
retrieval_promptConfigurationDesc: Customize ReAct prompt sections to adjust agent behavior
retrieval_agentIdentityDesc: Define the agent's role and capabilities
retrieval_chunkRetrievalToolsDesc: Search for specific information within the knowledge graph
retrieval_loopTerminationDesc: Configure when the agent should exit the agent's loop and deliver the final answer
retrieval_generationSettingsDesc: Configure the language model and sampling parameters for response generation
retrieval_selectLlmTooltip: Select an LLM to generate responses
retrieval_guidedExamplesDesc: Capture concrete examples to guide retrieval agent behavior in different scenarios
retrieval_unsavedChangesDesc: You have unsaved changes. Switching variants will discard them. What would you like to do?
retrieval_toolDescriptionHint: Explain when the agent should use this tool. This description will be used to generate a prompt for the agent.
retrieval_exitToolDescriptionHint: Describe when the agent should call the exit tool to terminate the ReAct loop and deliver the final answer.
retrieval_exitInstructionsDesc: Configure the strategy and iteration limits for the retrieval loop.
retrieval_outputInstructionsDesc: Define the structure and presentation of the final answer, including format and source attribution.
retrieval_additionalOutputPlaceholder: Define additional guidelines or constraints for the response...
retrieval_confidenceBasedDesc: Exit when confident enough to answer, balancing thoroughness with efficiency.
retrieval_exhaustiveDesc: Explore all available tools before exiting, ensuring comprehensive coverage.
retrieval_efficientDesc: Exit as soon as a satisfactory answer is found, prioritizing speed.
retrieval_searchControlDesc: Select the control mode for metadata filtering. This determines whether the agent, the caller, or both specify filter criteria.
retrieval_searchSettingsDesc: Tune tool settings to control the scope and precision of the search. Choose whether the agent can override the search method or must follow this configuration.
retrieval_contextExpansionDesc: Enrich search results by including related chunks from the knowledge graph. Choose whether the agent can override the context expansion or must follow this configuration.
retrieval_includeReferencedChunksDesc: Include chunks, referenced by the matched chunks.
retrieval_includeAdjacentChunksDesc: Include adjacent chunks that share the same parent.
retrieval_exampleSubtitle: Guided example help tune how the agent retrieves and responds to questions.
retrieval_exampleLabelDesc: A short, descriptive name to identify this example.
retrieval_userMessageDesc: The question or message the user would send to the agent.
retrieval_userMessagePlaceholder: What does your return policy cover? Can I return items purchased online?
retrieval_agentResponseDesc: The expected response, including proper citations and tone.
retrieval_agentResponsePlaceholder: Our return policy allows returns within 30 days of purchase for most items [1]. Online purchases can be returned either by mail or in-store [2]...
knowledgeGraph_releaseToUpload: Release to upload to this knowledge graph
knowledgeGraph_unsavedRetrievalChanges: You have unsaved changes in Retrieval. What would you like to do before switching tabs?
knowledgeGraph_unsavedMetadataChanges: You have unsaved changes in Metadata Schema. What would you like to do before switching tabs?
knowledgeGraph_defineNewEntitySubtitle: Define a new entity type to extract from your documents
knowledgeGraph_entityInfoDesc: Give this entity a name and describe what it represents in your documents.
knowledgeGraph_atLeastOneColumn: At least one column is required
knowledgeGraph_allColumnsMustHaveType: All columns must have a name and type
knowledgeGraph_columnNamesMustBeUnique: Column names must be unique within an entity
knowledgeGraph_exactlyOneIdentifier: Exactly one column must be marked as identifier
knowledgeGraph_columnsDesc: Define the columns (attributes) for this entity. Mark one column as the identifier to serve as a unique key.
knowledgeGraph_columnDescPlaceholder: Explain what this column captures and how it should be used
knowledgeGraph_graphSettingsDesc: Configure the embedding model used for ingestion and graph building
knowledgeGraph_indexingSectionDesc: Select the embedding model used to create vector representations of content
knowledgeGraph_askQuestionsAboutKB: Ask questions about your knowledge base
knowledgeGraph_askQuestionsToTest: Ask questions to test your retrieval configuration
knowledgeGraph_retrievalFailed: Retrieval failed. Please check server logs.
knowledgeGraph_retrievalError: An error occurred while contacting the retrieval service.
knowledgeGraph_graphNameHint: A unique name for your knowledge graph
knowledgeGraph_graphDescPlaceholder: Describe the purpose of this knowledge graph
knowledgeGraph_graphDescHint: Brief description of what documents this graph will contain
knowledgeGraph_failedToCreateRetry: Failed to create graph. Please try again.
knowledgeGraph_dataSourcesDesc: Manage document sources for this knowledge graph
knowledgeGraph_addFirstSourceHint: Start by uploading a file(s) or connecting to external data sources
knowledgeGraph_deleteSourceDesc: Are you sure you want to delete '{name}'?
knowledgeGraph_deleteSourceWarning: This will remove the source, its documents, and all chunks. This action cannot be undone.
knowledgeGraph_purgeSourceDesc: Are you sure you want to purge all data from '{name}'?
knowledgeGraph_purgeWarning: This will delete all documents and chunks associated with this source. The source itself will be kept. This action cannot be undone.
knowledgeGraph_syncAllDesc: Are you sure you want to sync all sources? This will trigger a sync for every syncable source in this knowledge graph.
knowledgeGraph_syncAllWarning: Syncing may take a while depending on the number of sources and documents.
knowledgeGraph_syncStarted: Sync started for {name}. Click Refresh to see progress.
knowledgeGraph_syncAllStarted: Sync started for all sources. Click Refresh to see progress.
knowledgeGraph_metadataSchemaDesc: Define, discover, and manage metadata fields across all documents in this knowledge graph
knowledgeGraph_smartExtractionDesc: Configure which fields AI should extract
knowledgeGraph_addFieldsHint: Add fields to define what AI should extract
knowledgeGraph_fieldIdentityDesc: Define the field name and display properties
knowledgeGraph_fieldValueMappingsDesc: Configure which metadata fields and values map to this field definition, and set the resolution priority per source
knowledgeGraph_noSourcesAvailableInGraph: No sources available in this knowledge graph.
knowledgeGraph_firstNonEmpty: First non-empty value wins, drag to reorder
knowledgeGraph_addStepsHint: Add steps to define how this field is populated
knowledgeGraph_fieldIdentitySmartDesc: Define the field identifier used for smart extraction
knowledgeGraph_extractionHintDesc: Define how AI should extract this field
knowledgeGraph_extractionHintPlaceholder: Guide the AI on how to extract this field...
knowledgeGraph_typeConstraintsDesc: Define the value type, cardinality, restrictions and extraction requirements
knowledgeGraph_atLeastOnePredefined: At least one predefined option is required
knowledgeGraph_smartExtractionSettingsDe: Configure how AI extracts metadata from your documents
knowledgeGraph_extractionSettingsDesc: Configure extraction mode and the prompt used to generate JSON metadata.
knowledgeGraph_deleteFieldWarning: This won't delete existing metadata values, only the field definition.
knowledgeGraph_segmentationDesc: Split large documents into overlapping segments before extraction.
knowledgeGraph_chunkSegmentationDesc: Chunk-based extraction uses already segmented chunks (segmentation settings are ignored).
knowledgeGraph_chunkSegmentationNote: Segmentation is not needed for chunk-based extraction. Each chunk is already small enough to be processed directly by the AI.
knowledgeGraph_deleteFieldDefinitionDesc: Are you sure you want to delete the field '{name}'?
knowledgeGraph_deleteExtractionFieldDesc: Are you sure you want to delete the extraction field '{name}'?
knowledgeGraph_extractionCompletedChunks: Extraction completed: {docs} documents updated, {chunks} chunks processed{errorsSuffix}.
knowledgeGraph_presetFieldAdded: Added preset field "{name}" to schema and smart extraction
knowledgeGraph_schemaFieldCreatedFromExt: Created schema field "{name}" from extraction field
knowledgeGraph_chooseSourceType: Choose a source type to get started
knowledgeGraph_createNewVariantCaption: Create a new prompt template variant
knowledgeGraph_createNewVariantDesc: Create a new prompt template variant based on your current retrieval configuration.
knowledgeGraph_confirmProceed: Are you sure you want to proceed?
knowledgeGraph_aboutToUpdateThe: You are about to update the
knowledgeGraph_thatUseDefaultConfig: that use the default configuration and do not have a specific variant selected.
knowledgeGraph_variantDesc: Generated from retrieval configuration of knowledge graph {name}
knowledgeGraph_failedToGeneratePrompt: Failed to generate prompt. Check validation errors.
knowledgeGraph_noPromptTemplateLoaded: No prompt template loaded. Please load or create a template first.
knowledgeGraph_sourceCreatedScheduleFail: Source created, but schedule could not be saved
knowledgeGraph_sp_sectionConnectionDesc: Enter the SharePoint site URL to connect. Use the full site URL.
knowledgeGraph_sp_sectionScopeDesc: Optionally configure which content to sync from SharePoint.
knowledgeGraph_sp_includeSubfoldersDesc: Sync all nested folders under the selected path
knowledgeGraph_sp_willSyncAllPages: Will sync all pages from the SitePages library
knowledgeGraph_sp_sitePagesContentProfil: Tip: SitePages content is processed through the SharePoint Pages content profile for `.aspx` files.
knowledgeGraph_sp_failedToConnectRetry: Failed to connect to SharePoint. Please try again.
knowledgeGraph_sp_failedToSaveRetry: Failed to save SharePoint source. Please try again.
knowledgeGraph_conf_sectionProviderDesc: Select the Knowledge Source provider that holds your Confluence credentials.
knowledgeGraph_conf_noProvidersFoundMsg: No Confluence Knowledge Source providers found. Create one in Knowledge Providers first.
knowledgeGraph_conf_sectionSpaceKeyDesc: The Confluence space key to synchronize, e.g. 'ENG' or 'KB'.
knowledgeGraph_conf_sectionRootPrefixDes: When enabled, each page title is prefixed with its root ancestor page title.
knowledgeGraph_conf_sectionMetadataDesc: Comma-separated list of metadata field keys to store on each document (for filtering/retrieval). E.g. title, version_when, created_date
knowledgeGraph_conf_failedToConnectRetry: Failed to connect to Confluence. Please try again.
knowledgeGraph_conf_failedToSaveRetry: Failed to save Confluence source. Please try again.
knowledgeGraph_sf_sectionProviderDesc: Select the Knowledge Source provider that holds your Salesforce credentials.
knowledgeGraph_sf_noProvidersFoundMsg: No Salesforce Knowledge Source providers found. Create one in Knowledge Providers first.
knowledgeGraph_sf_sectionObjectApiNameDe: Salesforce Knowledge Article View object API name. Default is 'Knowledge__kav'.
knowledgeGraph_sf_sectionArticleIdFieldD: Salesforce field used as the stable document identifier. Defaults to 'ArticleNumber' (recommended — stable across versions). Use 'Id' only if you want version-level deduplication.
knowledgeGraph_sf_sectionTitleFieldDesc: Salesforce field used as the document title. Defaults to 'Title'.
knowledgeGraph_sf_sectionMetadataDesc: Comma-separated list of Salesforce field names to store as document metadata (for filtering/retrieval). E.g. Title, CreatedDate, LastModifiedDate
knowledgeGraph_sf_sectionOutputConfigDes: A template string defining how each article is rendered. Reference Salesforce field names in curly braces, e.g. {Summary}.
knowledgeGraph_sf_sectionExternalUrlDesc: Optional. URL template for linking back to the original article. Use {FieldName} placeholders for Salesforce fields. Referenced fields are automatically included in the query.
knowledgeGraph_sf_failedToConnectRetry: Failed to connect to Salesforce. Please try again.
knowledgeGraph_sf_failedToSaveRetry: Failed to save Salesforce source. Please try again.
